properties.displayName: System Information Discovery - PowerShell Get-CimInstance  Get-WmiObject  Get-ComputerInfo
properties.description: Detect PowerShell commands invoking Get-CimInstance, Get-WmiObject, Get-ComputerInfo or common WMI/Win32 class queries used to enumerate system information.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (ScriptBlockText|contains has "Get-CimInstance" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "Get-WmiObject" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "Get-ComputerInfo" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "Win32_OperatingSystem" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "Win32_ComputerSystem" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "Win32_BIOS") and Image endswith "\powershell.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "Get-CimInstance" or CommandLine|contains has "Get-WmiObject" or CommandLine|contains has "Get-ComputerInfo")
